1850010.name: CrossPlanet Beta
1850010.description:
IMPORTANT, READ BEFORE YOU DIVE IN: 

CrossPlanet is an unfinished product, and therefor has areas that lack polish and occasional bugs. We released this for free to share a passion project we created in our spare time, and gather feedback/ suggestions in case we decide to invest more into the game!


CrossPlanet – A Free Multiplayer Shooter Born from Passion

CrossPlanet is a fast-paced third-person multiplayer shooter focused on fluid movement, skill-based combat, and satisfying gunplay. Developed over 4 years by 2 developers, CrossPlanet is a love letter to the genre and the players who still crave tight, gameplay-first arena shooters.

Originally envisioned as a much larger game, CrossPlanet grew beyond the what our tiny team could create. But rather than let it disappear or cancel the game, we’ve chosen to share it freely with the world and gather feedback for future updates. While we improve the game, there will be no paywalls, no microtransactions, just gameplay.

Pure Shooter Gameplay. No Fluff.

CrossPlanet puts combat at the core. Sprint, double jump, evade, jetpack, aim down sights, and outmaneuver your enemies across a variety of dynamic multiplayer maps and modes. Choose from 11 distinct weapons, each with unique handling and purpose, 2 vehicles with insane power and durability, and engage in high-stakes battles that reward precision and movement.

Key Features:

✅ Multiplayer Warfare – Jump into competitive PVP action with no pay-to-win mechanics.
✅ Diverse Arsenal – Master 11 unique weapons with distinct recoil, roles, and tactics.
✅ Tactical Movement – Sprint, double jump, evade, jetpack and use the environment to gain the upper hand.
✅ Skill-Based Combat – Gameplay is king. Victory depends on your aim, your timing, and your strategy.
✅ Customization – Unlock 10 unique earnable armors to show off your achievements in battle. And a handful of skins for each.
✅ Plenty of Content – Fight across 10 PVP maps in 15 unique multiplayer modes.

The game features in-game stats, leaderboards, bots, and a flying camera for screenshots.

This is CrossPlanet — raw, honest, and driven by passion. While it's not a finished game, it's a piece of our journey we’re proud to share.

🎮 Join our Discord to look for players and connect with the community!
